summary: See clues file for full details. 5 tossups, 9 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 5 tossups and 9 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: In a diptych by this artist, a red cloth background backs Saint John the Evangelist supporting an agonised Virgin Mary watching the Crucifixion.
examples: In a diptych by this artist, a red cloth background backs Saint John the Evangelist supporting an agonised Virgin Mary watching the Crucifixion.

clues.clue: It's not Jan van Eyck , but this artist was commissioned by chancellorNicolas Rolin  to create an altarpiece depicting the Last Judgement for the Hospices de Beaune .A chain denoting membership in the Order of the GoldenFleece appears in this artist's portrait of the future Charles the Bold.
examples: It's not Jan van Eyck , but this artist was commissioned by chancellorNicolas Rolin  to create an altarpiece depicting the Last Judgement for the Hospices de Beaune .A chain denoting membership in the Order of the GoldenFleece appears in this artist's portrait of the future Charles the Bold.

clues.clue: The Prado holds a panel by this artist commissioned by the (*) Crossbowmen's Guild in Leuven, in which a blue-clad Mary faints while watching Joseph of Arimathea and Nicodemus carry Jesus.
examples: The Prado holds a panel by this artist commissioned by the (*) Crossbowmen's Guild in Leuven, in which a blue-clad Mary faints while watching Joseph of Arimathea and Nicodemus carry Jesus.

clues.clue: Mary holds Jesus' body diagonally in the central Pieta scene of this artist's Miraflores Altarpiece.
examples: Mary holds Jesus' body diagonally in the central Pieta scene of this artist's Miraflores Altarpiece.

clues.clue: Bartolommeo Fazio described a now-lost "Bathing Scene" that this artist painted while in Genoa.
examples: Bartolommeo Fazio described a now-lost "Bathing Scene" that this artist painted while in Genoa.

clues.clue: This painter depicted the Virgin Mary enthroned in an ornate, gothic-style niche in his Thyssen Madonna.
examples: This painter depicted the Virgin Mary enthroned in an ornate, gothic-style niche in his Thyssen Madonna.

clues.clue: Erwin Panofsky called a painting by this artist that is now in the Museo del Prado a "painted critique" of a painting by his teacher, the Master of Flemalle.
examples: Erwin Panofsky called a painting by this artist that is now in the Museo del Prado a "painted critique" of a painting by his teacher, the Master of Flemalle.

clues.clue: In a painting by this artist, a man with a black headdress and an ornate cloth-of-gold robe stares across the title action at the skull of Adam, which is on the ground.
examples: In a painting by this artist, a man with a black headdress and an ornate cloth-of-gold robe stares across the title action at the skull of Adam, which is on the ground.

clues.clue: This student of Robert Campin painted a body held in the shape of a crossbow in a commission for the Leuven guild of archers.
examples: This student of Robert Campin painted a body held in the shape of a crossbow in a commission for the Leuven guild of archers.

clues.clue: In that painting by this artist, Mary swoons as Nicodemus and Joseph of Arimathea lower the body of Christ.
examples: In that painting by this artist, Mary swoons as Nicodemus and Joseph of Arimathea lower the body of Christ.

clues.clue: In one work by this artist, angels are depicted in clothes that are color-coordinated with each of the Seven Sacraments.
examples: In one work by this artist, angels are depicted in clothes that are color-coordinated with each of the Seven Sacraments.

clues.clue: A woman leans against an ornamental drapery while a man in red performs the title action in this artist's St.
examples: A woman leans against an ornamental drapery while a man in red performs the title action in this artist's St.
